title: matthiola longiflora
intro: Matthiola longiflora, also known as the long-flowered stock or gillyflower, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Matthiola longiflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in homeopathic remedies due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties.
